body:
Continuing efforts in https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4304

PR made with 
```zsh
for f in src/**/*(.); do sed -i '' 's/[[:space:]]*$//' "$f"; done
```

[Above is slightly different from the command mentioned in #4304; I believe due to zsh shell used here VS bash shell in #4304(?)]
title: Remove trailing spaces part 2

body:
Continuation of https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4304 and https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/4429

After this, all directories will have been cleaned.
title: Remove trailing white spaces part 3
